export class TradeResultParser{constructor(){this._success=false;this._message='';}flush(){this._success=false;this._message='';return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;// Must match TradeResultComposer.java
this._success=wrapper.readBoolean();this._message=wrapper.readString();return true;}get success(){return this._success;}get message(){return this._message;}}
